title: Security User: Administrator
description:
Security User: Administrator

Security User: Administrator

This page allows you to add and remove Epson RC+ 8.0 users.

Two users are permanent: Administrator and Guest. Only the passwords can be changed for these users.

You should always use a password for the Administrator. No password is set at shipment time.

To add a user

Click
	 the [Add] button.

A
	 new user will be added to the tree.

Click
	 the new user [Group].

Click
	 the dropdown button and select the group for the user.

To delete a user

Click
	 the [User] you want to delete.

Click
	 the [Delete] button.

A
	 confirmation message to delete the user will appear.

To change a user's group

Click
	 the [Group] for the user you want to change.

Click
	 a dropdown button in the field and select a new group.

Editing Name, Login ID, and Password

Click
	 the [User] you want to change.

Edit
	 the field. All fields are not case sensitive.
